heading_content_part: You can send us email directly from the app or via email. We will only use this contact information you provide to us (for example, your name and email address) for the purpose for which you provided it to us. We will not share this data with third parties.If you wish to delete your contact information that we received upon your specific email inquiry, please send an e-mail to chebdev@gmail.com and your e-mail will be deleted.

IN-APP PURCHASESOur Applications enable in-app purchases.All of our Applications are free, but they include in-app purchases. In-app purchases may be made only upon entering the Google Play store password and you are responsible for maintaining the security of such password. Your authentication and security maintaining is subject to specific terms of the app store and the OS of your mobile device.

CHANGESThis Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time for any reason. We will notify you of any changes to our Privacy Policy by posting the new Privacy Policyhereandinforming you via email or text message.
